body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/supplier/delete 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/supplier/delete 
 ## 接口描述 
删除指定供应商 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"supIds","required":false,"label":"%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%22SUP20230814152024%22%2C%22SUP20230810185817%22%5D","desc":"%20String%E6%95%B0%E7%BB%84","maxLength":"1000"},"children":[]}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"body","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BD%93","exampleValue":"%E5%88%A0%E9%99%A4%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81","desc":"%20%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%9C%89%E6%AD%A4%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","required":false,"label":"%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"SUC0000","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E5%88%A0%E9%99%A4%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E6%9C%AA%E5%88%A0%E9%99%A4%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E7%9A%84%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E6%8F%90%E7%A4%BA","exampleValue":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":""}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 #### 请求报文
```json
{
    "supIds":["SUP20230810185817","SUP20230814152024"]
}
```
#### 响应报文
```json
{
    "body": "删除供应商成功！",
    "returnCode": "SUC0000",
    "success": true,
    "message": "成功"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|
  | --- | --- |
  | EROOR2| 删除失败|
|SUC0000|删除成功|
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/supplier/delete

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/supplier/delete

接口描述

删除指定供应商

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"supIds","required":false,"label":"%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%22SUP20230814152024%22%2C%22SUP20230810185817%22%5D","desc":"%20String%E6%95%B0%E7%BB%84","maxLength":"1000"},"children":[]}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"body","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BD%93","exampleValue":"%E5%88%A0%E9%99%A4%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81","desc":"%20%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%9C%89%E6%AD%A4%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","required":false,"label":"%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"SUC0000","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E5%88%A0%E9%99%A4%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E6%9C%AA%E5%88%A0%E9%99%A4%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E7%9A%84%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E6%8F%90%E7%A4%BA","exampleValue":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":""}}]}]}

接口调用示例

请求报文

{
    "supIds":["SUP20230810185817","SUP20230814152024"]
}

响应报文

{
    "body": "删除供应商成功！",
    "returnCode": "SUC0000",
    "success": true,
    "message": "成功"
}

错误码说明

错误码 错误信息
EROOR2 删除失败
SUC0000 删除成功
